seo.meta_title: Best Auth0 Alternatives for Next.js Developers (2026)
seo.meta_description: Looking for alternatives to Auth0? Compare the top Next.js auth tools — Clerk, Kinde, Better Auth — and find the right fit for your project.
seo.og_title: Best Alternatives to Auth0 for Next.js
seo.og_description: Top Auth0 alternatives ranked by Next.js integration score, pricing, and developer experience.

hero.headline: Best Auth0 Alternatives for Next.js (2026)
hero.subheadline: Auth0 not quite right? Here are the top alternatives, ranked by how well they integrate with Next.js App Router.

intro_paragraphs: Auth0 is a solid choice for Next.js authentication — auth0 by okta is the enterprise standard for authentication and authorization. But depending on your budget, team size, or feature requirements, one of these alternatives might be a better fit.

faq.question: Why would I choose something over Auth0?
faq.answer: While Auth0 scores 6/10 for Next.js integration, other tools may offer better pricing at scale (Free – $3,000+/mo with Yes, up to 7,500 MAU with limited features), different learning curves, or features that Auth0 lacks such as extremely expensive at scale - pricing jumps dramatically at 10k mau, complex configuration with steep learning curve for advanced features.
